description: The Republic of Ireland's Health Service Executive (HSE) has approved pembrolizumab in combination with paclitaxel (175 mg/m^2) and carboplatin (AUC-5) for reimbursement as a treatment option for the treatment of adult patients with persistent, recurrent, or metastatic cervical cancer whose tumors express PD-L1 with a combined positive score (CPS) >= 1.

contributions.description: Adding HSE approvals for reimbursement to database

contributor.name: Van Allen lab
contributor.description: Van Allen lab, Dana-Farber Cancer Institute

reportedIn.name: Pembrolizumab, PACLitaxel 175mg/m2 and CARBOplatin AUC 5 Therapy. NCCP National SACT Regimen. HSE.
